body_txt: Height has a lot to do with how someone interacts with the world. Since people base a lot of first impressions on appearance, a height that contrasts with how someone wants to look can cause them to be angsty, which can be expressed in different ways. This can come in two forms:  Subtrope of Appearance Angst . Compare Tiny Tyrannical Girl , Mister Big , The Napoleon , Tiny Schoolboy , Huge Schoolgirl , At Arm's Length . Can overlap with Bemoaning the New Body if a character suddenly changes into a taller or shorter form. See also Weight Woe , when a character is self-conscious about width instead of height, Height Insult , which often results in this trope, and Comically Tiny Arms , which can make it difficult for characters to reach things even if they're not short otherwise.
